title: Delicious Ukrainian Tomato Bake
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring salt-baked tomatoes, perfect for a hangover cure or a delicious meal, this recipe is egg-free friendly and packed with umami flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the tops off the tomatoes and scoop out the insides, leaving a shell.
Sprinkle the salt in a baking dish and arrange the tomatoes on top.
Drizzle the olive oil over the tomatoes and sprinkle with paprika and black pepper.
Fill each tomato with a mixture of chopped onion, minced garlic, and chopped fresh dill.
Bake the tomatoes for 30 minutes, or until they are tender and the filling is heated through.
Remove the tomatoes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the tomatoes hot, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
